name: Automated workflow & credential restoration system for self-hosted environments

parameters.content:
## Start here
### ⚠ Warnings ⚠
• In case of full restore, restore Credentials first!
• Any already existing credential or workflow will be overwritten…

### Instructions
• Optionnally re-create your SMTP credential.
• Manually copy this workflow to your new n8n instance.
• Launch it and restore everything!

Can be used to move your workflows to another instance 👍🏻

### Configure the "Start Restore" JSON according to your need
```
[
  {
    "credentials": true,
    "worflows": false
  }
]
```
(and modify the "notes" too!).

### Configure the "Init" node
```
const BACKUP_FOLDER = $env.N8N_BACKUP_FOLDER || '/files/n8n-backups';
const workflows_temp_folder = '_restore_temp';
const credentials = "n8n-credentials";
```

parameters.subject: =n8n SUCCESS: {{ $workflow.name }}
=n8n SUCCESS: {{ $workflow.name }}

parameters.command:
=#!/bin/bash

# Exclude current workflow from server restoration
# This script creates a temporary copy of all workflows EXCEPT the current one

# Get workflow info
WORKFLOW_NAME="{{ $workflow.name }}"
BACKUP_FOLDER="{{ $('Find Last Backup').first().json.backupFolder }}"
PROJECT_ROOT_PATH="{{ $('Init').first().json.workflowConfig.PROJECT_ROOT_PATH }}"
BACKUP_DATE="{{ $('Find Last Backup').first().json.latestBackupDate }}"
WORKFLOWS_TEMP_FOLDER="{{ $('Init').first().json.customConfig.workflows_temp_folder }}"

# Source is the backup folder with date
SOURCE_FOLDER="${BACKUP_FOLDER}/${BACKUP_DATE}"

# Destination is inside the project root path with backup date
TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER="${PROJECT_ROOT_PATH}/${BACKUP_DATE}_restore_temp"

# Clean the workflow name (same logic as Clean Filename node)
CLEANED_NAME=$(echo "$WORKFLOW_NAME" | sed 's/[<>:"/\\|?*[:cntrl:]]/_/g' | sed 's/[[:space:].]\+/_/g' | sed 's/_\+/_/g' | sed 's/^_\+//;s/_\+$//')

echo "🔍 Current workflow: $WORKFLOW_NAME"
echo "🧹 Cleaned name: $CLEANED_NAME"
echo "💾 Backup folder: $BACKUP_FOLDER"
echo "📅 Backup date: $BACKUP_DATE"
echo "📂 Source folder: $SOURCE_FOLDER"
echo "📂 Project root: $PROJECT_ROOT_PATH"
echo "📂 Temp restore folder: $TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER"

# Create temporary restore folder
mkdir -p "$TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER"
echo "✅ Created temporary restore folder"

# Count total workflows in source
TOTAL_COUNT=$(ls -1 "$SOURCE_FOLDER"/*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "📊 Total workflows in source: $TOTAL_COUNT"

# Copy all workflows EXCEPT the current one
COPIED_COUNT=0
SKIPPED_CURRENT=false

for file in "$SOURCE_FOLDER"/*.json; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    filename=$(basename "$file")
    
    # Check if this is the current workflow
    if [ "$filename" = "${CLEANED_NAME}.json" ]; then
      echo "⏭️  Skipping current workflow: $filename"
      SKIPPED_CURRENT=true
    else
      cp "$file" "$TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER/"
      COPIED_COUNT=$((COPIED_COUNT + 1))
    fi
  fi
done

# Display summary
echo ""
echo "📊 COPY SUMMARY:"
echo "   Total workflows: $TOTAL_COUNT"
echo "   Copied: $COPIED_COUNT"
echo "   Skipped (current): $([ "$SKIPPED_CURRENT" = true ] && echo "1" || echo "0")"
echo ""

if [ "$COPIED_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo "⚠️  No workflows to restore (only current workflow found)"
  # Clean up empty temp folder
  rmdir "$TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER"
  exit 0
fi

echo "✅ Ready for import from: $TEMP_RESTORE_FOLDER"
echo "💡 Use this folder path in the next Import Workflows node"

=# Clean up temporary restore folder
TEMP_FOLDER="{{ $('Init').first().json.workflowConfig.PROJECT_ROOT_PATH }}/{{ $('Find Last Backup').first().json.latestBackupDate }}{{ $('Init').first().json.customConfig.workflows_temp_folder }}"

if [ -d "$TEMP_FOLDER" ]; then
  rm -rf "$TEMP_FOLDER"
  echo "✅ Cleaned up temporary restore folder: $TEMP_FOLDER"
else
  echo "ℹ️ Temporary folder already removed or not found"
fi

nodes.name: ERROR: Find Most Recent Bkp Folder

main.node: ERROR: Find Most Recent Bkp Folder
